accurate.why: says it 'expands the number of authorized Centers of Excellence reviews'; the 5->7 change is the centers' support period in years, not reviews

no_hallucinations.why: 'Centers of Excellence reviews' mischaracterizes the period-of-support amendment

changes_to_existing_law.why: describes amendments to the Public Health Service Act

exceptions_conditions.why: notes conditions/eligibility e.g. tribal, community-based, request-based TA

effective_dates.why: notes FY2029/Sept 30 2029 reauthorization and reporting deadlines

correct_entities.why: NIH, HHS, IACC, PHSA correctly named

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
